Body.description: Validation succeeded and the CA set deletion request is accepted. There is no response body in this scenario.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Total number of requests you can make in the current time window. You can't make more requests than this value. See [Rate Limiting](ref:rate-resource-limit).

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Total number of requests you can still make in the current time window. See [Rate Limiting](ref:rate-resource-limit).

X-RateLimit-Next.description: The time when your request counter resets to the full limit specified by `X-RateLimit-Limit`. See [Rate Limiting](ref:rate-resource-limit).

Location.description: Hypermedia link to the newly created version.
